reach_why: Extends known feedback-loop and reward-hacking concerns, but does not open fundamentally new explanatory territory.
novelty_why: Non-obviously links recursive self-training, shallow linguistic filters, and plausible nonsense as shared evaluator-failure dynamics.
falsifiable_why: Test by comparing recursive self-training systems under flawed evaluators against external validation and diversity-preserving baselines.
explanation: Self-improvement can become self-poisoning when flawed evaluators recursively amplify plausible but misleading outputs.
